subject: deep in the heart of texas....

emails.subject: Deep in the heart of Texas....
emails.subject_base: Deep in the heart of Texas....
emails.body: Deep in the heart of Texas.... Well, how does it feel to be back? I'm sure, even though our fair city can't compete with London for history and culture, there are a few things you've missed about this place. Hope the flight back was good and I'm sure I'll be seeing you around. Susan

emails.subject: Re: Deep in the heart of Texas....
emails.subject_base: Deep in the heart of Texas....
emails.body: Re: Deep in the heart of Texas.... susan, i don't know how to do that message thing!! call me when you have a chance. I will be at my desk after 5pm........Just got back on Sunday. Will be here a month. How are you? What's new on work, men, other social front? Things good. Let me know when you have time. Darren 36661 Sorry, no steak nite tonight for this cowboy......
